result.stdout:
DynamoDB migration tool
=========================================================
Usage: dynamodb migration add [options] <Migration name>

Arguments:
  Migration name  

Options:
  -o|--output     The output directory where migrations will be stored.
                  Default value is: Migrations.
  -r|--root       Root directory of the application containing migrations.
                  Default value is:
                  /tmp/inspectra-help-dynamodbmigrationtool-0.0.6-ad6d95a05c9b4dbe91d3988d279a6ca6.
  -?|-h|--help    Show help information.

result.stdout:
DynamoDB migration tool
=========================================================
Usage: dynamodb migration down [options] <Migration name>

Arguments:
  Migration name  Name of the migration to revert, if it's not the last
                  migration, every migrations created after this one will be
                  reverted.

Options:
  -r|--root       Root directory of the application containing migrations.
                  Default value is:
                  /tmp/inspectra-help-dynamodbmigrationtool-0.0.6-ad6d95a05c9b4dbe91d3988d279a6ca6.
  -?|-h|--help    Show help information.
